obligations.rule: Default behavior: validate URLs with protocols ['http', 'https', 'ftp'], require TLD, allow fragments and query components, disallow underscores, and enforce length validation.
obligations.why: Baseline behavior as described in the README.

obligations.rule: Option `require_protocol`: URLs must include a protocol when set to true.
obligations.why: Explicitly documented option affecting validation behavior.

obligations.rule: Option `require_host`: URLs must include a host when set to true.
obligations.why: Explicitly documented option affecting validation behavior.

obligations.rule: Option `require_port`: URLs must include a port when set to true.
obligations.why: Explicitly documented option affecting validation behavior.

obligations.rule: Option `require_valid_protocol`: Protocols must match the `protocols` list when set to true.
obligations.why: Explicitly documented option affecting validation behavior.

obligations.rule: Option `allow_underscores`: URLs may include underscores in the host when set to true.
obligations.why: Explicitly documented option affecting validation behavior.

obligations.rule: Option `host_whitelist`: Only hosts matching the whitelist are valid.
obligations.why: Explicitly documented option affecting validation behavior.

obligations.rule: Option `host_blacklist`: Hosts matching the blacklist are invalid.
obligations.why: Explicitly documented option affecting validation behavior.

obligations.rule: Option `allow_trailing_dot`: URLs may end with a trailing dot when set to true.
obligations.why: Explicitly documented option affecting validation behavior.

obligations.rule: Option `allow_protocol_relative_urls`: Protocol-relative URLs are valid when set to true.
obligations.why: Explicitly documented option affecting validation behavior.

obligations.rule: Option `allow_fragments`: URLs may include fragments when set to true.
obligations.why: Explicitly documented option affecting validation behavior.

obligations.rule: Option `allow_query_components`: URLs may include query components when set to true.
obligations.why: Explicitly documented option affecting validation behavior.

obligations.rule: Option `disallow_auth`: URLs with authentication components are invalid when set to true.
obligations.why: Explicitly documented option affecting validation behavior.

obligations.rule: Option `validate_length`: URLs exceeding the maximum length are invalid when set to true.
obligations.why: Explicitly documented option affecting validation behavior.

test_groups.title: Default behavior validation
test_groups.rationale: Covers the default behavior of the validator as described in the README.

test_groups.title: Require protocol
test_groups.rationale: Ensures URLs must include a protocol when the `require_protocol` option is enabled.

test_groups.title: Require host
test_groups.rationale: Ensures URLs must include a host when the `require_host` option is enabled.

test_groups.title: Require port
test_groups.rationale: Ensures URLs must include a port when the `require_port` option is enabled.

test_groups.title: Require valid protocol
test_groups.rationale: Ensures protocols must match the `protocols` list when the `require_valid_protocol` option is enabled.

test_groups.title: Allow underscores in host
test_groups.rationale: Allows underscores in the host when the `allow_underscores` option is enabled.

test_groups.title: Host whitelist
test_groups.rationale: Ensures only hosts matching the whitelist are valid when the `host_whitelist` option is used.

test_groups.title: Host blacklist
test_groups.rationale: Ensures hosts matching the blacklist are invalid when the `host_blacklist` option is used.

test_groups.title: Allow trailing dot
test_groups.rationale: Allows URLs to end with a trailing dot when the `allow_trailing_dot` option is enabled.

test_groups.title: Allow protocol-relative URLs
test_groups.rationale: Allows protocol-relative URLs when the `allow_protocol_relative_urls` option is enabled.

test_groups.title: Allow fragments
test_groups.rationale: Allows fragments in URLs when the `allow_fragments` option is enabled.

test_groups.title: Allow query components
test_groups.rationale: Allows query components in URLs when the `allow_query_components` option is enabled.

test_groups.title: Disallow authentication components
test_groups.rationale: Disallows URLs with authentication components when the `disallow_auth` option is enabled.

test_groups.title: Validate length
test_groups.rationale: Ensures URLs exceeding the maximum length are invalid when the `validate_length` option is enabled.
